---
title: ""
page-layout: full
engine: markdown
listing:
  contents: "."
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
---

::: page-header
# Writing
:::

<p style="margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;font-size:1rem;line-height:1.75;color:var(--text-muted);">Commentary on research, policy, and practice.</p>

<hr style="border:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);margin:0 0 1.5rem 0;">
